summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for nearby clinics feature on public URL. POST /api/clinics returns 4 mock clinics with required fields, dashboard Nearby Clinics section renders below chat, geolocation-driven load works, Google Maps embed loads, and responsive layout remained intact across desktop/tablet/mobile.
action_items: No blocking defects found for requested nearby clinics scope.
Keep /api/clinics as MOCKED by design for this task; replace with real provider in future iteration if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: Nearby clinics section implementation is correctly placed after dashboard action/chat grid, satisfying below-chat requirement.
POST /api/clinics currently returns deterministic mock clinic data around user coordinates and satisfies requested contract.
loadNearbyClinics runs on mount and language change; this can re-trigger geolocation prompts on language toggle and may need UX refinement later.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested with granted geolocation permission. Nearby clinics dashboard flow passed including cards count (4), map iframe, and responsive layout checks.
rca of the issue: No issue reproduced for requested nearby clinics features in this run.
